---
title: "Subsystem Summary Report"
author: "VVERDAD"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Subsystem Margin Summary — Phobos Sample Return (PhSR)

This report summarizes the mass and power margins for the spacecraft,
comparing current best estimates against system capacity limits.

## Mass Budget

The mass equipment list tracks component-level current best estimate (CBE)
masses and maximum expected value (MEV) masses including design maturity
margins. The spacecraft is sized for an ESPA-Grande class launch capacity
of 2200 kg total wet mass.

```{julia}
#| label: mass-margin
#| echo: true

# Mass values from the mass equipment list
dry_mass_cbe_kg = 537.45
dry_mass_mev_kg = 590.64
system_margin_kg = 147.66
dry_mass_with_margin_kg = 738.3
propellant_kg = 1117.7
wet_mass_kg = 1856.0

# ESPA-Grande capacity
capacity_kg = 2200.0

# Compute margin
mass_margin_kg = capacity_kg - wet_mass_kg
mass_margin_pct = (mass_margin_kg / capacity_kg) * 100.0

println("=== Mass Margin Summary ===")
println("Dry mass (CBE):         $(round(dry_mass_cbe_kg, digits=1)) kg")
println("Dry mass (MEV):         $(round(dry_mass_mev_kg, digits=1)) kg")
println("System margin:          $(round(system_margin_kg, digits=1)) kg")
println("Dry mass w/ margin:     $(round(dry_mass_with_margin_kg, digits=1)) kg")
println("Propellant:             $(round(propellant_kg, digits=1)) kg")
println("Total wet mass:         $(round(wet_mass_kg, digits=1)) kg")
println("Launch capacity:        $(capacity_kg) kg")
println("Available margin:       $(round(mass_margin_kg, digits=1)) kg ($(round(mass_margin_pct, digits=1))%)")
```

### Mass Breakdown

| Category | Mass (kg) |
|:--|--:|
| Dry Mass (CBE) | 537.45 |
| Dry Mass (MEV) | 590.64 |
| System Margin | 147.66 |
| Dry Mass with Margin | 738.3 |
| Total Propellant | 1117.7 |
| **Total Wet Mass** | **1856.0** |

## Power Budget

The power budget tracks subsystem power draws across five operating modes.
Available power is set by the solar array end-of-life (EOL) output at Mars
distance: **1503 W**.

```{julia}
#| label: power-margin
#| echo: true

# Per-mode total power draws from the power budget (row 17 = totals)
power_cruise_w = 167
power_science_w = 242
power_comms_w = 215
power_tag_w = 339
power_safe_w = 167

# Solar array EOL power at Mars (parse numeric value from quantity string)
solar_eol_w = parse(Float64, split("1503 W")[1])

modes = ["Cruise", "Science Mapping", "Communications", "TAG Maneuver", "Safe Mode"]
draws = [power_cruise_w, power_science_w, power_comms_w, power_tag_w, power_safe_w]

println("=== Power Margin Summary ===")
println(rpad("Mode", 22), rpad("Draw (W)", 12), rpad("Margin (W)", 12), "Margin (%)")
println("-"^58)
for (mode, draw) in zip(modes, draws)
    margin_w = solar_eol_w - draw
    margin_pct = (margin_w / solar_eol_w) * 100.0
    println(rpad(mode, 22), rpad(round(draw, digits=1), 12),
            rpad(round(margin_w, digits=1), 12),
            round(margin_pct, digits=1), "%")
end
```

### Power Mode Descriptions

| Mode | Description | Total Power |
|:--|:--|--:|
| Cruise | Quiescent interplanetary transit; C&DH active, ADCS in wheel-control, SDST receive-only, survival heaters | 167 W |
| Science Mapping | Phobos observation from QSO; camera and GRNS active, HGA downlink, full ADCS | 242 W |
| Communications | High-rate data downlink via HGA to DSN; TWTA at full power, no science instruments | 215 W |
| TAG Maneuver | Touch-and-go descent and sampling at Phobos surface; reaction wheels at peak, RCS active, sample system powered | 339 W |
| Safe Mode | Minimum-power survival mode; sun-pointing via sun sensors and RCS, LGA downlink, maximum heaters | 167 W |

## Conclusions

This report confirms the current mass and power margin posture for the
Phobos Sample Return (PhSR) spacecraft. Both budgets should be
tracked as the design matures to ensure adequate margin is maintained
through each review milestone.

---

*Report generated by VVERDAD*
